mapper.select:
SELECT LINK_ID AS linkId, SYSNAMEA AS sysnamea, PTPNAMEA_BAU AS ptpnameaBau, PTPNAMEA_PAU AS ptpnameaPau FROM NIA.TB_TOPOLOGY WHERE
(SYSNAMEZ = #{sysname} AND PTPNAMEZ_BAU != #{ptpNameBau})
(SYSNAMEA = #{sysname} AND PTPNAMEA_PAU != #{ptpNamePau})

select opp_sysname as oppSysname, opp_port as oppPort from ((select node_idz as opp_sysname, portz as opp_port from nia.tb_e2e_topology where node_ida = #{sysname} and porta = #{port}) union all (select node_ida as opp_sysname, porta as opp_port from nia.tb_e2e_topology where node_idz = #{sysname} and portz = #{port})) a

SELECT SRC_NODE_NUM, SRC_NODE_ID, SRC_IF_NUM, SRC_IF_ID, DEST_NODE_NUM , DEST_NODE_ID, DEST_IF_NUM, DEST_IF_ID, LINK_DESC, VLAN , TAG, SRC_IP_ADDR, SRC_MAC_ADDR, DEST_IP_ADDR, DEST_MAC_ADDR , PREFIX, TOPOLOGY, BANDWIDTH, LINK_TYPE, LINK_DIV , CIRCUIT_NUM FROM RESOURCE.TB_BACKBONE_LINK WHERE ((SRC_NODE_NUM = #{resid} AND SRC_IF_NUM = #{ifid}) OR (DEST_NODE_NUM = #{resid} AND DEST_IF_NUM = #{ifid}))
